   contain the root `toctree` directive.

Documentation for gwb_analysis
==========================

This library facilitates astrophysical interpretations of nanohertz gravitational wave data. It largely builds upon `holodeck <https://github.com/nanograv/holodeck>`_ and uses several of its functionalities.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 2
   :caption: Contents:
	
   installation
   quickstart
   modules
